description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the relateiq/oracle-java8 Docker image. Add a job named build_and_publish_release that runs only on the master branch, decodes the $SIGNING_SECRET_KEY_RING_FILE base64 string into secring.gpg, then executes ./gradlew clean build uploadArchives -Psnapshot=false -Psigning.keyId="${SIGNING_KEY_ID}" -Psigning.password="${SIGNING_PASSWORD}" -Psigning.secretKeyRingFile="$(pwd)/secring.gpg" and finally runs ./gradlew closeAndReleaseRepository. Add a job named build_and_publish_snapshot that runs on all branches except master, also decodes $SIGNING_SECRET_KEY_RING_FILE into secring.gpg and runs ./gradlew clean build uploadArchives -Psigning.keyId="${SIGNING_KEY_ID}" -Psigning.password="${SIGNING_PASSWORD}" -Psigning.secretKeyRingFile="$(pwd)/secring.gpg". Both jobs use the same image and default stage with no caches or artifacts.
